title: contact_changes: all IDs returned as created on any state change
description: Scenario: client calls ChatContact/changes after any unrelated state change (e.g. a contact is blocked). The handler returns every current contact ID in created[], not updated[]. A conforming JMAP client will attempt to create objects it already has, causing duplicates or silent clobbers. The comment says Simplified but the semantic error is user-visible: stale contacts reappear as new after any update. Maintenance consequence: any client author will file a bug when they see duplicate contacts after a state change.
